tasks.subject: Task 1: Ghost core — record + replay (scenes/ghost.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** record_ghost_track (captures a genome's deterministic run as an (N,3) pose array) + GhostRunner (replays in real time).

**Files:** Create src/blueball/scenes/ghost.py; Test tests/test_ghost.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GhostRunner paces at config.PHYS_DT/row, freezes on last pose (done).
- empty track -> ValueError.
- record_ghost_track returns faithful non-empty (N,3) track; len==sim.steps.

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_ghost.py -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/scenes/ghost.py", "tests/test_ghost.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_ghost.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GhostRunner paces at PHYS_DT/row and freezes at end", "empty track raises ValueError", "record_ghost_track faithful non-empty (N,3), len==sim.steps"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Ghost rendering — draw_ghost_ball (render/renderer.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Renderer method blitting the ball sprite darkened + translucent at a world position.

**Files:** Modify src/blueball/render/renderer.py (__init__ + draw_ghost_ball); Test tests/test_ghost_render.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- draw_ghost_ball(world_xy, deg) blits headless without error.
- cached ghost sprite avg alpha < opaque ball sprite.

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_ghost_render.py -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/render/renderer.py", "tests/test_ghost_render.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_ghost_render.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["draw_ghost_ball blits headless without error", "cached ghost sprite avg alpha < opaque ball"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Race genome assets + config resolver (config.py, assets/race_ghosts/)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bundle best genome per static level as committed assets + config mapping/resolver.

**Files:** Create src/blueball/assets/race_ghosts/{generalist,vertical_climb}.npy; Modify src/blueball/config.py; Test tests/test_race_genomes.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- resolve_race_ghost_genome(level) returns an existing (510,) genome for each of the 5 static levels.
- unknown level -> None.

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_race_genomes.py -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/config.py", "src/blueball/assets/race_ghosts/generalist.npy", "src/blueball/assets/race_ghosts/vertical_climb.npy", "tests/test_race_genomes.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_race_genomes.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 static levels resolve to existing (510,) genome", "unknown level -> None"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Race scene flow — ModeSelect + Menu(mode) + PlayScene ghost + cli
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire landing screen, mode-aware level select, and the in-game ghost into a playable race.

**Files:** Create src/blueball/scenes/mode_select.py; Modify src/blueball/scenes/menu.py, src/blueball/scenes/play.py, src/blueball/cli.py; Test tests/test_race_flow.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ModeSelect routes to MenuScene(mode); Esc->None.
- race menu hides Infinite Run; single shows it.
- race select -> PlayScene with GhostRunner; no genome -> ghost None.
- PlayScene(ghost) updates+draws headless; ghost=None unchanged.

**Verify:** `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_race_flow.py -q && .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/scenes/mode_select.py", "src/blueball/scenes/menu.py", "src/blueball/scenes/play.py", "src/blueball/cli.py", "tests/test_race_flow.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_race_flow.py -q && .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ModeSelect routes to MenuScene(mode); Esc->None", "race menu hides Infinite, single shows it", "race select -> PlayScene with GhostRunner; no genome -> None", "PlayScene(ghost) updates+draws; ghost=None unchanged"]}
```
